center.name: 穆里
center.summary: 穆里是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红嘴穗鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in the foothills of the Himalayas from the Murree Hills in Pakistan to eastern Nepal

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in the foothills of the Himalayas from the Murree Hills in Pakistan to eastern Nepal
